summary: All 9 phases complete. Added missing PL ↔ notation and replaced raw constructors (.imp, .bot, .neg, .and, .or, .box, .diamond, .untl, .snce, .someFuture, .allFuture, .somePast, .allPast) with scoped notation across ~115 Lean files in Propositional/, Modal/, and Temporal/. Full CI passes: lake build (2976 jobs), lake test (8976 jobs), checkInitImports, lint-style. Zero sorries, 18 pre-existing axioms unchanged.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering all 9 phases, key discoveries (Pi type ambiguity in constructor return types), and CI verification results
